summary: This release improves citation readability, restores temporal search filters, and ensures follow-up suggestions remain visible during active chat sessions.

entries.title: Clearer notifications on fallback searches
entries.description: When a search filtered by product or date yields no results, the chat response now displays a notice explaining that the search has broadened to the wider documentation library.

entries.title: Restored date-based search filtering
entries.description: Temporal queries such as "last 6 months" or "since 2026" now correctly filter search results based on document publication dates instead of returning the entire unfiltered library.

entries.title: Cleaner citation excerpts in side panel
entries.description: Citation previews in the sidebar now display only substantive document text, omitting structural headers and page titles to make them easier to scan.

entries.title: Collapsed duplicate citations in panel
entries.description: The citation panel now groups multiple versions of the same topic together under the most recent source, reducing visual clutter from duplicate results.

entries.title: Fixed scrolling in long citation lists
entries.description: Users on smaller screens can now scroll through citation panels containing more than six sources.

entries.title: Reliable follow-up question suggestions
entries.description: Suggested follow-up questions now automatically retry when rate-limited, preventing suggestion chips from blanking out during consecutive rapid queries.

entries.title: Chat generation latency
entries.description: Responses may take 18 to 28 seconds to fully generate due to AI model processing times.

entries.title: Progressive streaming for chat responses
entries.description: Development is planned for progressive text streaming, which will display responses word-by-word as they generate to reduce perceived waiting times.

entries.title: Version filtering unavailable for XSIAM
entries.description: Searches specifying XSIAM version numbers will display a notice explaining that XSIAM documents are organized by calendar date, falling back to general XSIAM docs.

entries.title: Limited coverage for Cortex AgentiX
entries.description: Due to the recent launch of Cortex AgentiX, documentation coverage is currently limited, and queries may temporarily return answers drawn from general XSOAR documentation.
